overview: Frost Elemental is a Normal-class Elemental monster. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): 10000 HP, 42 physical damage, 70 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 999, MaxImpactEndurance 999. 1 attack, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Self Explosion at 9999.9% ratio (41999.6 base damage).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.
